themes.exampleQuote: Please do not miss this hidden gem in Pittsburgh.
Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
Make sure you get the raspberry lychee macaroon, it is gluten free made with almond flour.
There are multiple locations so please make sure you check it out.

notable_quote: Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers reach for superlatives — Paris comparisons, best-thing-ever claims about the raspberry lychee macaron — and nitpick nothing; the criticism gap is conspicuous in 525 reviews, which itself signals how narrow the dissatisfied slice is.
quarter_narrative: Thirty Pittsburgh creators filmed La Gourmandine Hazelwood this quarter and collectively pulled over a million plays on TikTok — the bakery posted nothing back. The top video alone, from @ms__lesh, ran 719,500 plays on a caption that barely mentioned the food; the shop was background to the moment and still drew a crowd. Meanwhile Page's holds the Pittsburgh Sweets family lead this issue specifically on social momentum, the one axis where La Gourmandine is effectively absent despite being the most creator-filmed pastry shop in the city. The rank climbs when the business stops being a subject and starts being a participant.
tldr_read: Over a million TikTok plays from 30 outside creators, zero posts from the bakery itself in 40 days — dominant review sentiment, dormant owned social; Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Pastry Shops.
tldr_meaning: Every other signal axis is at or above family median; the Instagram momentum reading is the single variable separating this business from the Icons tier.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: A Million Plays From Other People's Phones, And A Dormant Instagram Holding The Rank Down.

playbook.headline: End the 40-day Instagram silence
playbook.action: Post within this week — one photo of the raspberry lychee macaron or the morning pastry case — to reopen the Instagram momentum signal that has gone dark for 40 days.

playbook.headline: Turn 30 creators into a feedback loop
playbook.action: Repost or story-share the 30 TikTok creators already filming here; @ms__lesh's 719,500-play video is sitting unused as a conversion asset.

playbook.headline: Fill the Google photo category gaps
playbook.action: Google shows 304 photos but only six tagged categories — Staff and Outside are missing entirely; adding business-submitted images in those slots raises visual catalog completeness.
